name: Breedon Group PLC Registered Sh
summary: Breedon Group PLC is a leading construction materials group in Great Britain and Ireland, manufacturing and supplying essential products such as aggregates, cement, asphalt, and ready-mixed concrete. The company operates a vertically integrated business model, owning quarries, manufacturing plants, and distribution networks. Breedon Group PLC is headquartered in Breedon on the Hill, Leicestershire, UK.
